sprint: Companion Canon Freeze -- Asset Path Correction
task: Same-day follow-up to the Companion Canon Freeze sprint: the real, immutable Lumo/Story Egg asset uploads landed at their real, literal-per-spec location (top-level assets/lumo/ and assets/story-egg/), not the assets/companions/<id>/ nesting the prior sprint mistakenly assumed. Merged the 3 remote upload commits cleanly (zero conflicts), then corrected the mismatch: js/companionDirector.js now constructs CompanionEngine with {assetsBase:'assets/'} (one new module constant) and calls loadRegistry('assets/') to match -- js/companionEngine.js itself remains completely untouched (re-verified via git diff, zero lines changed), since the engine's own default stays generic. Every authored JSON data file (Lumo's companion.json/personality.json/animations.json, Story Egg's companion.json/animations.json, registry.json) was moved to sit beside the real uploaded PNGs; the prior sprint's own placeholder Lumo art and the now-empty assets/companions/ folder were deleted. A second correction: the real Lumo upload is a genuine 8-pose superset of Canon 2's 7-pose list (talk.png included) -- restored to companion.json/animations.json rather than retired a second time, since it's real canonical art, not a placeholder to trim. Story Egg's real upload covers 6 of 7 Canon 1 poses (hero.png still pending, disclosed not fabricated). New per-folder READMEs (assets/lumo/README.md, assets/story-egg/README.md) replace the old assets/companions/README.md; docs/PRODUCT_ASSETS.md gained the Story Companions category row it had always been missing; docs/COMPANION_CANON.md and docs/COMPANION_ENGINE.md were rewritten to reflect the real, final paths and pose counts, with a new disclosed 'Asset Alignment correction' changelog entry. Verified via the existing Companion Canon Playwright suite (updated to 42 assertions for the real paths/content) plus the full 10-script Creator/Builder/Card-Platform regression suite and both goldenBuild.js suites -- all passing unchanged, zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder change, no Companion Runtime/Registry-mechanism/Package-Contract redesign, no CSS/index.html change; confined to companionDirector.js, the relocated asset data files, two new per-folder READMEs, and documentation.
